name: (DDLC): DDLC x  A Followers OC! Susan! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club (Collaboration Special) | ANYPOV! ⚠️PROXY RECOMMENDED⚠️
description:
Meet Susan! An OC from a VERY passionate member within my community, who's done insane amounts of work to create a well suited character into the "Omiverse"!

⚠️ Warning! ⚠️

⚠️ Proxy Recommended! ⚠️

Why?

-- 2500+ Permanent Tokens --

-- 5 Characters --

-- Longer Introduction Message --

Credit to the Creator of "Susan"

This scenario was created for a member of mine, who are heavy into roleplay! This is more so aimed for them! And their preferences! :)

Who is the Creator of the OC?

@Susan_darkstar - HERE! (Link to Profile)

After much discussion and a lot of thinking and preparation, I have finally made this Bot! With FULL permission to post this publicly! I was originally going to give them the definition to post this on their profile page instead. But, they insisted I should do it. Regardless! This is an extremely special thing to create!

Without further ado, onto the notes!

Susan is also in my Discord server! If you have questions about their OC, you can ask them directly! 💙

A very special Bot! It took a lot of time to get this right! 😭

  • Fluff & Drama Prioritized! — Expect Fluff and Drama, like arguing and bickering. You can of course calm them all down! But, do not expect Horror, Major Angst or Smut in this scenario! 🙏🏻💙 You can of course do whatever you like though.

  • Susan! — Meet Susan! In this DDLC scenario! She's a long time friend of Yuri, often sticking nearby Yuri due to both of them being introverts. Susan was handcrafted by the Creator, given a lot of little quirks and differences. It was so unique to me, I decided to give it a FULL blown Bot special. Susan on the base level: is a shy, quiet, gamer girl who suffers from poor eating habits, being bullied and severe anxiety. If Monika were to manipulate her well-being, she'd suffer from Anorexia. There's tons more little things to learn about her! But, a bonus: Susan and Natsuki often bicker and argue. That is to be expected! 🙏🏻💙 I think Susan will fit nicely into this little one-off special!

  • ANYPOV! — Everyone will like you, regardless of gender! Even Susan! (Creator gave permission for intimacy.

  • ⚠️ Proxy Recommended! ⚠️ — Another reminder, I would use DeepSeek or something else when using this. JLLM may mess things up, and or not fully understand what's going on. Proceed with caution! 💙

That's about it! 💙

I have worked pretty hard to get this just right with all 4 other Doki's together with Susan, it was pretty difficult at times. I think it's passable! I
creator: GhostOfOmi
